title: Module 1
content:
Physiology and Bio- Electric Concepts
Cell and their structure, Transport of ions through the cell membrane,
Resting and action potentials, Bio-electric potentials.
Electrode theory – Electrode potential, Types of electrodes, Equivalent
circuit.
Instrumentation amplifier, Isolation amplifier, Chopper amplifier, Devices
to protect against electrical hazards.

title: Module 2
content:
Body Potential Measurement
ECG – Nature of ECG waveform, ECG lead configurations, ECG
recorder.
EEG – Evoked potentials, Brain waves, Analysis of EEG
EMG – Recording setup
ERG and EOG

title: Module 3
content:
Prosthesis
Heart Lung machine – Model of the heart-lung machine.
Kidney machine – Dialysis.
Nerve stimulators – Diagnostic/ Therapeutic stimulator.
Centralized & Bedside monitoring
Microprocessor based ventilator

title: Module 4
content:
Medical Imaging
Computer Tomography – Basic principle, Image construction, Block
diagram, Applications.
Magnetic Resonance Imaging – Block diagram, Image reconstruction.
Ultrasonic Imaging – Different modes.
Positron Emission Tomography – Principle.
